steps.t: Bats may be found throughout the Dourstocks. Carcharan may be found in a cave at Gorotham, north-east from Echad Mothelen, beyond Burgûl-stazg. Lavanf…
Lavanferon is at Echad Mothelen, south-west from Gorotham, beyond Burgûl-stazg. You should return the satchel to Lavanferon with news of your victory …
